combat_pillars.weapon_mastery: broad melee accuracy, damage, and weapon handling
combat_pillars.archery: ranged damage with positioning advantage and lower sustained throughput
combat_pillars.defense: armor handling, blocking, and incoming damage reduction
combat_pillars.magery: spell power and universal magical fundamentals
combat_pillars.stealth: evasion-side growth, awareness control, and ambush power
combat_pillars.tracking: monster awareness, trail reading, and scouting
combat_pillars.survival: expedition endurance, recovery, and hazard tolerance

rules.resolution_notes: Compact roguelike stats remain in data, but contested combat rolls convert accuracy, evasion, shield block, and status penalties into explicit 0-100 percent chances.
rules.damage_notes: Physical damage uses BRP-style weapon dice plus STR+race size modifier and skill step bonuses, then subtracts armor soak. Existing item damage/ac fields are adapted through CombatSystem tables.
